The '''Twin Hills''' was a location on the [[Endor/Legends|forest moon of Endor]] which consisted of two large mountain peaks. The Twin Hills were known as the home of the [[Gonster|Two-headed Gonster]], a knowledgeable being that specialized in the capture and neutralization of monsters. The hills were a fair distance from [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]], and [[Ewok/Legends|Ewoks]] who planned to visit the Gonster did so with the use of [[Hang-glider/Legends|hang gliders]].<ref name="TR" />

The young Ewoks, [[Wicket Wystri Warrick/Legends|Wicket Wystri Warrick]], [[Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka/Legends|Kneesaa a Jari Kintaka]], [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]], and [[Latara/Legends|Latara]] once traveled to the Twin Hills to speak with the Gonster about stopping the [[Raich]].<ref name="TR" />

==Appearances==
